## Format details

**Format name:** <!-- e.g. XCF -->
**MIME type:** <!-- e.g. image/x-xcf -->
**Typical extension(s):** <!-- e.g. .xcf -->
**Magic bytes (hex):** <!-- e.g. 47 49 4D 50 20 58 43 46 -->
**Reference / spec URL:** <!-- link to official docs or trusted reference -->

## Why should this be added?

<!-- Brief justification — common format, requested by users, etc. -->

## Are you willing to implement it?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR  
- [ ] No, I'd like someone else to implement it
